title: SEIHRF-OD: Code, data, and figures for 'Political distrust, armed conflict, and body reclamation drive Ebola transmission dynamics in eastern DRC'
description: Reproducibility package for the SEIHRF-OD model paper submitted to The Lancet Infectious Diseases (2026). Contains Stan/Python/R calibration code, INSP sitrep data (INRB-UMIE/Ebola_DRC_2026, build 13d78cb), posterior draws (127 confirmed cases, SitReps 001-012), all publication figures, sensitivity analysis, hold-out validation, and posterior predictive checks.

creators.name: Kasereka, Selain K.
